active_work.text: Mission-control metrics remain 25/68 verified, 1 active, 0 blocked, and 1 deferred. The active finish-board row is still drmTMB#59 numerical-guard sensitivity. The current source-of-truth update banks the native R/TMB fixed-effect skew-normal guard grid: 200 complete-data fits, 0 fit errors, convergence and pdHess rates of 1.000, zero fitted-scale floor-dominated observations, and 27 fixed-gradient warning rows, so the overall decision is diagnostic_hold. This is skew-normal guard evidence only; recovery accuracy, interval calibration, comparator parity, direct Julia, Julia-via-R, release, and CRAN remain separate gates.
